1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: retrieve 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) prefiltered by return period

3.description: retrieve buildings in Drammen (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

6.description: count unique buildings affected by 200-year flood zones
